data.title: SharpLink Gaming Suspected of Significant Ethereum Withdrawal
data.description: According to TechFlow, on August 9, blockchain analytics platform Lookonchain reported that an address suspected to be linked to SharpLink Gaming has withdrawn 17,655 ETH from a centralized exchange (CEX) over the past 18 hours. The value of the withdrawn Ethereum is approximately $72.7 million.

data.title: Ethereum PoS Network Sees Significant Changes in Validator Queues
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, the Ethereum Proof of Stake (PoS) network is experiencing notable shifts in its validator queues. Currently, the exit queue reports approximately 479,300 ETH, down from a recent peak of 744,000 ETH. At the current market price, the ETH exiting the PoS network is valued at around $2.013 billion, with a withdrawal delay of 8 days and 8 hours.

In contrast, the demand for staking by new validators has significantly decreased. On July 17, there were 435,000 ETH queued to enter the network. Today, the entry queue has dropped to 22,000 ETH, valued at approximately $92 million, with a current queue time of 9 hours.

data.title: Core Scientific Reports Decline in Q2 Mining Revenue
data.description:
According to PANews, Core Scientific, a Nasdaq-listed Bitcoin mining company, has released its financial results for the second quarter of the 2025 fiscal year. The report reveals a significant decrease in mining revenue, totaling $62.4 million, compared to $110.7 million in the same period last year. This decline is attributed to a 62% drop in Bitcoin mining output. Additionally, the company's digital asset hosting mining revenue fell to $5.6 million from $24.8 million in the previous year, with a gross profit of $5 million, down from $38.8 million.

In response to market concerns regarding the proposed all-stock sale to CoreWeave, Core Scientific stated that the transaction is still pending. The deal requires approval from the company's shareholders and customary closing conditions, including applicable regulatory approvals.

data.title: Bitdeer Increases Bitcoin Holdings to Over 1,700 BTC
data.description: According to Foresight News, Nasdaq-listed Bitcoin mining company Bitdeer has released its latest Bitcoin holdings data on X. As of August 8, Bitdeer's total Bitcoin holdings have increased to 1,718.1 BTC. This figure represents the company's pure holdings and does not include Bitcoin deposited by customers. Additionally, Bitdeer produced 74.8 BTC through mining this week but sold 32.6 BTC.

data.description:

data.title: Up To $5,000 Per Person Incoming After Healthcare Firm Allegedly Exposes 918,000 Americans in Data Breach
data.description:
A pediatric healthcare firm accused of potentially exposing private information of its patients and employees after a cyberattack at its IT services provider has jointly agreed with the outsourcer to pay millions of dollars to settle a class action lawsuit.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/08/09/up-to-5000-per-person-incoming-after-healthcare-firm-allegedly-exposes-918000-americans-in-data-breach/
